etimesWho was Robert Goddard? The father of Modern Rocketry, whose 100-year-old cabbage field invention will propel NASA's Artemis 2 rocketRobert Goddard's 1926 launch of the first liquid-fueled rocket, though modest, marked a pivotal moment in rocketry. His foundational principles, including turbopumps and gimbaling engines, are now integral to NASA's Artemis 2 mission, which will send astronauts around the moon, a testament to his enduring legacy.

etimesSkip the market: ‘Rent’ a mango tree and enjoy 90kg of mangoes this summerA new service allows people to lease a mango tree for a season. Customers can choose a tree online and receive its full harvest, up to 90 kilograms. Farmers manage the trees and fruit. This model connects urban consumers with fresh produce and offers farmers stable income. It promotes sustainable farming and redefines food ownership.
